general_data.description: nGen DT generator angular characterization test
general_data.purpose_of_run: Observing effect of 3.5% H2 on release dynamics compared to 1000 ppm. Using nGen DT generator for the first time. Attempting to replicate run 1, 3, 4, 5 TBR and fluence.

notes: nGen positioned under the work surface, at an angle to the long edge of the epoxy table. Target plane aligned with the axis of the vessel, axis of the generator perpendicular to the axis of the vessel. Center of target plane at a distance of 5.5 cm under the bottom of the epoxy plate. Briefly raised to 140 kV to raise anode voltage to desired value.

foils.position: height of target plane, foils facing source point perpendicularly
